hero_typed: The Insta-algorithm ignores you, but I offer a choice that will change everything.
vp_title_1: We don't just make viral Reels with
vp_subtitle: We train the Instagram algorithm to love your account.
vp_big_text_1: We launch content marketing on your page that gives you more
pain_desc: If you're here, your content isn't working as it should. The Instagram matrix has broken your growth.
pain1_text: Targeted advertising gets more expensive every day. Budgets drain, and the cost of a new lead breaks through the ceiling. Old methods no longer deliver ROI.
pain2_text: You hired an editor, bought equipment, created the perfect picture, but no one watches your videos. Beauty without meaning is money down the drain.
pain3_text: Constant headache and creative crisis. No ideas, no inspiration, but the algorithm demands consistency. Burnout becomes your companion.
pain4_text: You have a business, consultations, clients. No 5 hours for preparation and filming. You need a fast content generation format that doesn't drain your time.
pain5_text: The page looks too official, boring and "plastic". People buy from people, and your brand lacks humanity, emotion and character.
pain6_text: Your content simply gets lost in the feed among thousands of others. You don't attract attention, don't stand out, and don't create trends. You go unnoticed.
sol_title_accent: We train the Instagram algorithm to promote your content.
sol_step1: Analyze viral formats in your niche
sol_b1_text: An additional 1,000,000+ people will see your page and your product
sol_b2_text: Constant contact with your audience, you'll be remembered
sol_b3_text: Improved perception of your profile by Instagram algorithms
cases_desc: Instagram statistics before and after our content work
cases_fact1: Videos gain tens and hundreds of thousands of views
cases_fact2: The algorithm starts actively promoting pages
pricing_desc: Two service levels — one result: millions of reach
pkg_profi_desc: Turnkey content pipeline. We produce — you publish. Stable growth and millions of reach.
pkg_f2: Client chooses topics — we find videos and edit turnkey
pkg_f3: Client records reactions or provides product videos (both work)
pkg_f4: We add offers to videos if needed
pkg_f6: We can post content on behalf of the client
pkg_expert_desc: Strategic partner for your brand. We don't just make content — we build a system that sells.
pkg_ef1: Everything from Pro — 3–5 Reels, editing, publishing, analytics
pkg_ef2: Strategic session — we build a plan to integrate the client's product into every video
pkg_ef3: Content for a narrow niche — lawyer? We find videos about family cases. Fitness trainer? Content about gym and weight
pkg_ef4: Personal project manager — oversees all work, implements corrections instantly
pkg_ef5: Strategic integration of product and offers into content
faq_desc: Answers to the most common questions
faq1_q: Do I need to know how to shoot video?
faq1_a: No. We provide simple instructions and examples. A phone and well-lit room are enough.
faq3_q: Do I need to give access to my page?
faq3_a: Your choice. You can post videos yourself, keeping access to yourself, or give it to us for turnkey profile management. Everything is confidential.
faq4_a: The first viral videos can take off in the first days. Stable growth — within a month.
faq5_a: No. It works for businesses, experts and brands.
faq6_q: Will these videos be related to my product?
faq6_a: We make videos that are directly or tangentially connected to your page. All topics and materials are approved by you.
faq_other_text: If something is still unclear, or you have payment difficulties — leave a request and our Care Team will help find an answer as quickly as possible.
modal_desc: Fill out the form and we'll contact you
modal_success: Request sent! We'll contact you shortly.
